objective: Plan a non-product preregistered sovereignty trial with frozen System independence, an operationally independent provider or verifier, identities, control dependencies, terms, outside options, costs, risks, rights, benefits, and subsidy disclosure.
falsifiable_claim: The trial cannot begin until independently operated System identities, methods, comparators, stop rules, participant-specific baselines, and a provider or verifier independent of both sovereign System administrations are frozen without exposing private valuations.
dependencies: Provider or verifier independently administered from both sovereign System administrations
exit_criteria: System identities, control dependencies, and independence criteria freeze before work, including an explicit provider-or-verifier criterion that excludes control by either sovereign System administration.
Each participant's method and outside option plus direct/local comparator and stop rules commit without exposing private value.
A retained negative fixture substitutes a provider or verifier controlled by either sovereign System administration and the preregistration verifier rejects the trial.
Retained evidence log contains exactly one literal M13_SOVEREIGNTY_TRIAL_PREREGISTRATION_EXIT=0; process exit status alone is insufficient.
adversarial_or_fault_proof: Alter System control, hide shared administration, or replace the independently administered provider or verifier with one controlled by either sovereign System administration; also mutate the terms root, independence criteria, method, outside option, cost, risk, rights, benefit, subsidy, comparator, or stop rule after preregistration.
remaining_nonclaims: The protocol is unsigned or self-declared workflow evidence, not product authority.
Preregistration is not cooperation success, positive surplus, demand, or stage closure.
source_provenance: Plan-level proposal derived from docs/architecture/_meta/work-items/m0-m14-plan-gap-audit.md at origin/master 61eba1802992c01efa7d3188184ff315ad9d2ba0; status transaction 2026-07-22.
